1.content:
Fire wasn't crackling, neither were there intense screams or pits of radiating lava.

No, there were no obvious signs except a cold brisk wind following in its footsteps. A supernatural daemon was walking amidst a crowd of unsuspecting, busy mortals. If any inspected the heavily cloaked figure for more than a moment they'd realise that something nasty was afoot. But instead, they simply left a path for the odd figure to walk into, many not wanting anything to do with someone so strange looking. Though anybody who came too close felt a chill down their spine and quickly found themselves walking in a different direction, which was many people seen as the figure was casually walking down the wrong side of a busy London street. It was staring forward intently, as its eyes finally spotted its target, for a moment a pulse of iridescent azure light radiating from the cloak in anticipation. Its power was welling up and people began to gaze in anxious wonder, some briskly walked away, others commented on the strange presence the figure was emanating.

One couple of risk-takers felt brave enough to approach and investigate the figure. A young man was the first to speak, he and his partner both looked relatively youthful and good-looking, they were dressed casually with a hint of style. "Hey, what's the act buddy are you a magician?" he asked.
The young woman had buried her anxiety less-so than her partner, she held onto her jewelled necklace for a boost of confidence before adding, "Are you a street performer?"
Again her male counterpart spoke brazenly, "It's mysterious but not much of a performance is it, have you started already?”

The aura coming from the figure intensified steadily as the posture of the thing underneath changed. It became less hunched and rose up to meet the curious man at his own height. The aura had gotten heavy enough that the couple felt pushed back and took a step away from the thing before them. Finally the figure raised and turned its hooded head to face them directly.

The couple instantly realised they'd made a mistake and tried to move away quickly, only to realise their bodies weren't listening, all their muscles had gone to sleep. They couldn't perceive a face, only the wooden mask that the daemon wore to hide amidst the world. It was cracked and worn, as if it had moulded to fit a face many millennia ago. A faint outline of a face could be seen through the eye-holes in the mask but neither man nor woman saw anything other than the flaringly hot glare from the molten orange eyes staring back at them. The piercing white irises of the hooded figure had them frozen in terror.

Half the crowd had dispersed in fear and those who remained did so from a distance.

When it spoke, something seemed wrong... the voice was scratchy and deep. It spoke no words in English, the crowd was utterly confused yet the couple understood exactly what the figure was saying in the ancient language as if it were speaking to their primal souls.

"Much time has passed since last I was addressed by a mortal... very interesting" The voice was oddly well-spoken and sly with a hint of mischief at the core of every word. "Ah but I see you are like all the others, self-important, proud and stupid... what menial thoughts your heads pursue”. The raspiness of the voice was disappearing, like it hadn't spoken for a long-time but was gradually warming up, "I shall answer your question… No... but now as restitution for the disturbance..."

The tiny white irises pulsed larger for a fraction of a second as a limb wove under the cloak. Instantly both the man and woman felt extremely dizzy, they started to wonder where they were and why it the air felt as hot as a sauna when the weather was so cold and dreary. The figure began skulking away and uttered one last thing, "Perform".

The two began gasping deep breaths of air.
The woman was fanning her hands around trying to cool down and the man splashed some water from his bottle on his forehead. It wouldn’t work, it was and would continue to only get hotter for them. They started uncontrollably panting as the heat rose quicker throughout their bodies; they unbuttoned, unfastened and unclasped their clothes in a desperate hurry for reprieve. The man was the faster of the two who was quickly in his underwear with a noticeably large bulge pushing outwards. He quickly found his thoughts clouded with lust and desire like never before, his partner had never once looked so absolutely arousing as she did in this moment. Before she could finish taking off her matching white panties and bra she felt stunningly racy hands on her hips and let out a muffled moan as she was lifted and pinned against the nearest building. Neither had felt desire as they did now, it was overwhelming and incomparable. Within seconds their underwear had hit the floor, their frenzied moans filled the air and the man pounded his lover furiously against the wall with her legs kicking out in pleasure to the public.

Her loins were pulsating with every push from her lover’s manhood, she was dripping wet and her nails were digging in and scratching his back like a cat's claws, yet neither of them could feel pain right now. Only pleasure.

The crowd wooted and hissed mixed reactions at the same time, many took out phones to record the public indecency only to find their screens had strangely been completely smashed to bits.

Just down the street, the hooded figure reached its destination. In giant silver letters, the words 'HMP Pentonville Penitentiary' were written. It smiled behind the mask, a regular looking male hand extended from the cloak with blue tattoos all over it. It began walking again, but this time trailing its fingers across the wall and gate of the prison. The tattoos began glowing and without warning alarms sounded loudly, shocked guards were shouting and wailing as every cell and door in the prison began unlocking itself. The figure reached the other end of the entrance and jabbed with one of its long nails into the air.

Pop, Pop, Pop, Pop, Pop

Each and every tyre belonging cars, bikes and any other vehicles the guards and police owned suddenly popped all around the area.

"Hmm... that's done... now I have, about two hours before I have to return, what to do? Who should I visit?" mused Dolos, the lord of deception, lies and manipulation as he let out a yawn and launched into the upper atmosphere, his dark-blue feathered wings rose out from small slits in the cloak carrying him faster than a jet. His eagle-like, devilish eyes scanned around England for victims with particular thoughts.
1.title: Rise of Dolos

choices: Bryce decides to talk to them privately
Bryce decides to leave for now
11.content:
The school field was bustling with students from all year groups; Bryce attended a rather prestigious school filled with various students from all over the country. He was lucky to be here considering he only just scraped by the entrance exam. However, going to a school full of kids that can get in on their talents alone meant he wasn't anywhere near the best at any one thing. If he chose football, basketball, running, the list goes on... he'd be alright to average at best, always shown up by someone who could really apply themselves to the activity.

Right now he was sat opposite one of his closest friends at one of the many tables in the outdoor eating area situated close to the lunchroom of the school. Many of his friends were on the table this lunch, to his right sat Penelope and across the table from left to right there was Johnny, Axel and Maya. All of them but Maya had been in the same class throughout their education, Maya had joined a year ago in sixth form but quickly settled in to the group. This was the only place Bryce could really excel, if chatting and socialising was a sport he'd win the trophy every time.

"So... Axel had just left to go have a piss or something right, so because I knew he was totally on edge from the film, I followed him like a spy," Bryce recalled, enthusiastically raising his hands into the shape of a pistol, "I was quiet as a mouse, and there's these boxes right outside the bathroom from Christmas decorations so I jump into the empty box and wait... and wait... and wait... like seriously I start wondering if Ax's okay in there?"

"It really wasn't that long..." remarks Axel to the table with a deadpan voice, being so close to Bryce meant he'd gotten a bit tired of the constant exaggeration.

The table chuckles and Bryce waves him off, continuing the story, "So anyway, he finally unlocks the door after washing his hands and I just spring out of the box like 4 feet in the air and pounce on him! He screams like a first year girl and I tell you if he hadn't been to the toilet just then he'd have fucking shat himself!" The story made the table break out into light-laughter from all but Axel who sighed.

He knew Bryce well enough to not recall the reality of the situation; it'd only lead to him getting all down in the dumps. So he smiled and raised his hands "aha yeah, you gave me a good scare buddy but maybe not quite that much."

Johnny prodded Axel with his elbow, "oooh, scared the witch was gonna getcha dude!"

"hey... leave him alone"
The quiet voice came from the small, blonde Maya, who obviously had a crush on Axel. It was something everyone in the group knew but nobody wanted to discuss. Everything went quiet for a moment until Penelope broke the silence. She was half-Spanish, got a scholarship from the volleyball department and enjoyed spending time with guys more than girls for the most part. Which was strange to Bryce considering she was the only lesbian he knew. She was taller than half the table at 5'11 and often teased Bryce about it whenever he joked about her accent or body.

"It's a good story Bryce, but I get the feeling you're exaggerating a few details... like always, remember last time when you said you'd climbed that roof a million times, then you could barely scramble halfway up when we put you to the test"

"Oh will you never forget about that, my legs were tired from overworking myself at the gym okay?" He replied sullenly, "and the wall was wetter than a dog outta a river"

Axel sighed and Penelope giggled, "It was barely even damp?"

"I'm just telling you what I felt." He said coldly, feeling a bit defeated.

For a while he retreated into himself, Penelope had taken over the conversation and turned it into another of her Volleyball stories, seriously if he didn't know her well you’d think it's all she knew about. It was then that Bryce got distracted; he suddenly felt icy cold on the tops of his shoulders... goosebumps raised all along his arms and legs. He looked up and around but couldn't spot anything strange.

"You okay dude?" Asked Johnny, spotting his friend looked more anxious than he'd ever seen him... "Something up?"

"Ugh..." He wanted to speak up, but felt something watching him... it was just like the feeling that comes over you following a really scary film, but the suddenness of it made it all the more unnerving. He put his head down and ignored Johnny, trying to escape the feeling, his friends were all speaking but he could barely hear their voices, what he could hear was a low cackling.

It rose in volume into it was all he could hear, all the noises of students talking, fighting and moving had gone, even the birdsong and the wind had disappeared. All he could hear was the clear, powerfully devious voice of Dolos speaking directly into his mind. "A good speaker makes a good liar, though you are already good at both... they say the punishment of a liar is that he is never believed, even when he speaks the truth. That shalt not be an issue for you."

Bryce clutched at his head, begging internally the voice leave him alone. Then he felt his tongue recoil in his mouth as if it'd been singed by a hot flame. He felt nauseous and faint... finally the sounds were returning but his mind was fading... and fading. Bryce suddenly fainted for the first time in his life, his body slumped over forwards on the table.


When he came to, everything seemed so bright. He felt a pain on his forehead and shook his arms... his body felt drained of blood. Axel was stood right in front of him, "He's waking up... dude can you hear me, what happened to you? Are you alright?"

It took a moment but Bryce's voice came back to him, his tongue felt numb and his eyes were heavy. "Ugh.. yeah, I- I'm fine".

A shiver quickly ran through Bryce's body, his eyes opened wider, the blood returned to his limbs and when he rubbed his forehead, he realised the pain was almost entirely gone. He was awake again, as awake as before... what had happened? "D-did I have a stroke or something?"

"No dude, I think you just fainted, have you had any water today?"

"A bit..."

Maya spoke up, she was small and timid enough that Bryce had missed her presence, "You already look a bit better, Penelope and Johnny went to grab help for you."

"R-right, don't worry... really I'm fine... I just thought I heard something weird..."

"Huh... what did yo-"

The door to the outdoor lunch area blasted open and Penelope’s strong thighs led the school nurse over to the table, cutting Maya off mid question. "Hey you're alright?! What the hell was that all about?" questioned Penelope as the nurse took out her stethoscope.

"I don't really know, but really I'm okay, you don't need to do this?"

"I don't need to young man, but it's my job to make sure what you say is true so give that arm here and let's check your blood pressure." replied the kind-hearted nurse as she tied an arm cuff just above his elbow and lay the stethoscope onto his heart. "Please be quiet now everyone." She asked and began counting to the rhythm.

"Hmm... he seems to be alright, maybe you got a fright from something, either way drink some more water and take it easy for the rest of the day." advised the nurse.

Bryce smiled as she was unfastening the arm cuff, "See guys, stronger than ever!"

"Oof" the nurse let out a surprised noise as the arm cuff suddenly sprung off her patients arm, Bryce felt strange, his arms and legs were tingling with a pleasurable and familiar pain... just like he'd usually get after a workout. He looked at his arm to see the veins were slightly pumped out, "What the..." his bicep was changing, and he quickly realised most of the muscles in his arm were getting a pump, the same was happening to his legs and even his abs felt tighter than normal. "What's happening?" he asked in a mild panic.

"Excuse me?" said the nurse.

"What do you mean dude?" asked Axel.

"My... muscles look bigger?"

"Yeah I guess they do a little bit... but you have been going to the gym more often lately?"

"Oh don't start flexing on us all again Bryce, now's not the time to flaunt your arms, we were worried about you." replied Penelope with a hint of spite, she knew it was true though... he looked bigger again, she didn't understand why he kept trying to get bigger, it looked strange to her on his smaller frame.
11.title: Bryce Hall

choices: Bryce no longer thinks he's small
No change to Bryce but to society instead
111.content:
Despite Penelope's less-than-thrilled comments and Axel's confusion, Bryce couldn't help but subtlety flex his muscles... they felt good... and strong. He could feel the blood rushing into each vein. Each muscle felt slightly larger and tingled with fatigue, he'd effortlessly gained the pump of about two or three work-outs somehow?

He wasn't dim, he knew what he'd said and how it'd seemingly affected him and everyone around him... he thought for a moment before deciding to make a crazy test, if his theory wasn't right, it could go very wrong for him. He knew why Penelope was acting so uncharacteristically short with him, she'd spoken to him a handful of times about cutting back on the gym... telling him his muscles didn't suit his frame, and that he should just be happy how he was. But she couldn't really understand, at 5'11 she'd ended up pretty tall for a girl, she never had to deal with the constant harassment from guys or the depressing rejections from taller girls. Bryce knew just what he wanted to try, it was just a matter of making it seem natural just in case he really was going mad!

"Well, sorry Pen but I'm not trying to flex on you, what's your problem with my muscles?" he asked, trying not to slip up on his words.

Penelope huffed and crossed her arms, "You really don't listen, I've told you before, sorry Bryce but they just don't suit a smaller guy? No offense, you should be happy how you are dude... short guys can be kinda cute too you know?"

"So cute..." mocked Axel with a chuckle, at 6'1 he'd never had to picture the world from Bryce's perspective.

Bryce shrugged it off, he was used to it by now... "Funny? I don't think I'm that small?"

He waited... one eye half-shut... unsure if his speculations were insane and if they weren't what would happen and how would it occur?
111.title: Bryce makes a test

choices: Hit the street full of desire
1111.content:
Milliseconds seemed like minutes to Bryce as thoughts and questions endlessly streamed in his frazzled mind, he couldn't really comprehend what was happening... if what he thought was happening, was happening... what did it mean for him, his life, his beliefs and his world!

"Sorry? I don't get it?" Penelope's voice broke his daze, "I didn't want to make you feel bad, I was just talking objectively."

Bryce felt his new muscles tense in embarrassment, he looked at his friend's confused faces... it looked like they didn't understand what he was saying. He grabbed the underside of the table and went to leave, he needed a few minutes alone to think. But as he rose, he couldn't ignore the muscles in his legs telling his brain his body was heavier. It didn't make sense, what had caused such a sudden growth?!

"Hey, you're tall to me!" noted Maya, trying to raise the mood... and it kinda worked, she had a way of diffusing tension like nobody else, at 4'10 she was instantly seen as disarming and innocent to most and Bryce always appreciated having someone smaller than him around. The group shared in a moment of laughter, but suddenly Bryce felt a stinging pain in his abdomen, then another from his pelvis and one more flowing down his spine and splitting off down the backs of his toned legs. Something was happening... and it was happening fast, so fast that his friends were just finishing giggling when he noticed his jeans didn't reach his ankles, his shirt felt tight across his shoulders and his already large arms barely fit the holes they came through. His body ached for a stretch... like he'd been shoved into a cardboard box and left there for a couple days, endorphins rushed his mind as he realised what has happening, one of his greatest wishes was slowly coming true.

He worked with the feelings and gave a large upward stretch... his joints creaked and popped and suddenly his shirt was untucked from his tight trousers... it felt so natural and when he finally opened his eyes he saw Maya, she looked even smaller! But she hadn't shrank... No. He looked to Penelope and Axel and uncontrollably gasped. He'd always been looking up to them, but right now, he was eye-level with a very confused Penelope.

"What was I just saying?" she asked in wonder.

Everything looked a little strange, like he was stood on a kerb or on his tip-toes. The thought lingered in his mind and Bryce suddenly stood on his tip-toes, raising his body even higher; now he was looking over Penelope's wavy hair. He felt powerful, very powerful and he could even feel himself hardening below the belt.

"You were calling me short?" Bryce was very happy to remind her, his grin was slightly mad and spread wide across his face.

Penelope's nose scrunched and her trimmed eyebrows furrowed, "...right, yeah I remember but why?" she didn't understand... she could recall her exact words, but they didn't make sense anymore? Bryce was never that short, they were practically the same size... the last time he could've been considered short was like... 3 years ago?

"eh... still pretty short for a guy" Joked Axel, giving his best mate a firm, friendly punch to the bicep.

"No I'm not" he spoke without thinking but seconds later the feeling returned to his body and he realised what was happening. Again he couldn't hold it in as his body begged for his skin to stretch, he threw his arms out, shoulders up and twisted at his hips in one big extension. God it felt amazing to grow. Maya and Penelope watched their friend steadily rise higher than their heads without batting an eye. Bryce's shirt started to strain from his growth, his legs had turned his jeans into skinny ones, the bottom hem was halfway up his calf now and even his underwear felt very tight. But still his body rose and extended until he was a few inches taller than Axel whose face reflected the confusion that Penelope had worn just seconds before.

"huh?"

It felt incredible, being taller felt better than any amount of muscle training could ever feel. He was looking down on almost everybody around him now, Maya looked tiny and Penelope who had always been just-out-of-reach to him was looking upwards, she looked so much less intimidating. Finally he looked to Axel, and just said,

"...you were saying?"

"oh... I err, doesn't matter, I wasn't making sense bro... I'm just glad you're feeling better"

"Me too" said Maya timidly, a look in her eyes had changed, she was playing with her hair and her head barely reached Bryce's pecs now. He felt his enlarged manhood grow slightly harder, his desire was rising higher, his fantasies were coming true like he was living a dream and he wanted to test more, but how... and where?

(Penelope Ref - http://tny.im/nLe)
1111.title: Bryce grows taller

choices: Bryce changes people on a whim
11113.content:
Bryce looked out over the busy field to the streets, he felt a little bad messing with his friends and although there were definitely candidates for testing within the school grounds, he really wanted to test the limits of his new ability and felt it'd be safer to test away with people he didn't know... that way he'd feel less guilty.

Penelope's phone bleeped and she suddenly seemed perturbed, "Shit, sorry guys I have to go get ready for my match, look, I'll see you all later, Bryce take it easy okay?"

Before he could answer, she'd slung her gym sack over a shoulder and dashed off to get ready. If she was going now that meant lunch was almost over and he still had a few classes before he could officially leave. "I've gotta go too guys, I've got an appointment or something..." he lied, but suddenly a note appeared on the school receptionist's desk about Bryce's general check-up at 13:00PM.

"Okay big man, see you tonight maybe?"

Bryce struggled to hold back a grin, he'd never been called big man by Axel genuinely... "Yeah dude I'll see you later, you too Maya"

It was rather fun tradition to meet up at Penelope’s house following one of her matches, to either celebrate a win or if it was a loss; drink away her sadness. He briskly walked away with much longer strides than he was used to and pinched himself just before emerging from the rusty school gate, "Nope, definitely real... well let's see what I can do?" he spoke to himself, feeling very powerful and important.

He strutted down the street he'd walked a thousand times, letting his inhibitions drop and his mind run wild... now the street looked like a playground to him, like dough he could mould, the people akin to toys... He needed to test if he could make changes without people hearing him, if he could make other people change, if he could make them notice, if he could change inanimate things and if it was only bodies or if he could influence minds too.

First he spotted an average man, walking alike to Bryce just the opposite way, Bryce covered his mouth and spoke in a whisper, "That guys about to fall over..." The man looked up as a bird cawed at him from above, the toe of his shoe hit a raised cobble from the street and suddenly his body toppled down into a heap on the ground, he groaned and rubbed at his ankle,
"...but he's not hurt and finds fifty pounds on the floor where he fell." Bryce added.
The man stopped rubbing his ankle and his face lit up with excitement, both his hands scrambled to where another cobble had come loose, he pulled a note out and as Bryce passed by his mind welled with excitement. Nobody but him needed to hear, and if he went wrong he could just fix it later! Suddenly he didn't feel so anxious about going a little further, and a little lewder seen as he was still pretty aroused from his own growth.

Next he saw a couple holding hands, going about their day normally. The man looked like a bit of an average Joe, he was a rather tall white-collar kind of man. Both him and his presumed wife looked upper-middle class and her face screamed boredom. The woman looked prim and proper, she wore a reserved but slender blue dress to match her partner's navy-blue designer cardigan. She was lagging a little behind her husband who strode ahead with purpose, Bryce thought she was presumably being dragged along to a meeting or something and before they could get too close Bryce spoke under his breath again...


The woman stopped dead in her tracks and her expression turned to disapproval, she tugged her husband’s hand back towards her and stomped her heel down in annoyance. The husband turned and upon seeing his wife's expression drastically changed his posture, he kneeled down before her with a guilty look, like he knew he'd misbehaved. She clapped her hand against the back of his ear causing him to let out a little yelp, he immediately crawled closer to the heel she'd stomped and bowed his head to the ground.

"Bad boy!" The woman went into her purse as she scolded her husband, she pulled out a large collar and attached it to a short lead. Bowing down, she secured the collar tightly around the man’s neck, his expensive clothes were getting dirtied from the ground but as he looked up his eyes were filled with obedience.

"I let you off the lead for one moment and you stand on two feet and run off ahead of me... well we'll have none of that bad behaviour, let’s take you home"

The man whimpered but his wife ignored it and turned around, with a firm yank of the lead the man let out a choking sound before quickly following by his wife’s heels on all fours. He wasn't very fast but the woman seemed to care very little as she continued at a rather quickly.

Bryce couldn't help but laugh, he'd said the man was her property, that he was her pet, and now he decided to add, "When they get back home they'll both go back to how they were before but realise what happened today". Bryce had all the power he could ever wish for, he was really getting aroused and with his propensity for words all he needed were ideas to make his every whim come true.
11113.title: Hit the street full of desire

111131.content:
Bryce approached a row of three round tables with people having drinks in the sun, the first had two young ladies enjoying cocktails chatting about how stressed their assignments had them, the next table had a trio of mature acquaintances; two guys and one woman, and finally there was a lone Asian girl working on her laptop. As Bryce passed by, he spoke aloud, his voice full of grandeur having gained the confidence to do so.

The first table, "She's about to de-stress her friend with some oral", second table, "Those two are only here to help her when she lactates", then the final table, "She loves having stuff between her big titties". 111131.title: Bryce changes people on a whim

info.brief_description: A god of deception decides to gift world-altering abilities on a whim to a human.
info.description:
A god of lies, deception and manipulation; true to it's nature bequeaths a very powerful ability on an unsuspecting person one day. They find themselves unable to lie anymore... they may speak the lie as normal, yet they would find that all of reality will bend to make their lie the truth. Only our speaker knows about how things used to be unless specifically stated. Nobody else can notices, all reality will change accordingly to the user's lies. (Heavily taking inspiration from the excellent and well-known work of Wokod - https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/1897904-The-dictaphone)

This story can include:

- Breast expansion
- Height change
- Lactation
- Gender Bender
- Attribute Swapping
- Mind Control
- Clothing Play
- Other sorts of expansion (ass, hips, etc)

Not about:

- Vore
- Toilet, gas etc.
- Weight gain
- Death
- Furry

Please,

- Participate, and have fun!
- Respect other people's work (try to follow their chapters and/or the story!)
- Focus on descriptive growth and reality changes : that's what the story is about!
- Don't go into rampage ! No "Steve suddenly shrinks the world to the size of a pea and eats it" : play with the characters and elements of the story, but don't break them!
- No one-line additions (except when it's for giving people more choices, but keep it cool anyway!).
- Try your best to write with good grammar and punctuation, a few paragraphs go a very long way, and the features on this site are excellent.
- You have ideas? You want to add your character? You're welcome!

Our Candidates (Characters)

All of them are possible victims or disciples of our manipulating god depending on how they use or interpret their new ability. There's a range of character's here to let the story flow in a few directions.

Bryce Hall
18 years old. 5'8, fuzzy but styled brown hair with faint-freckles running across his nose and cheeks, stocky build for his size.
Happy-go-lucky kinda guy, unfocused and easily distracted but overall a kind person. Not very popular with the ladies romantically due his his height, but a friend to many in his sixth-form. He tends to exaggerate a bit in conversation to make himself seem more interesting and for humorous effect.

Lauren-Jade
19 years old, 5'9, straight black hair with one side shaved and dyed dark-violet, skinny and pale with a C-cup chest.
The youngest daughter of a large family with three older brothers. Lauren, or Jade as she likes to go by is a tough-nut to crack with a harsh, introverted personality, she spends much of her free time reading or painting. Her father and mother split when she was young, so she was practically raised by her older brothers when her mother developed a drinking habit. She can be narcissistic, rude and very sarcastic to those she doesn't know or care about (which is most people), but those who have found a way closer to her heart would describe her as mischievous, creative and a bit vain.

Frank Thompson
32 years old, 6'3, short black hair, averagely fit with a good build but a small cock.
Single, and has been for a long time. Frank is an insecure man working a job he hates, he feels life has given him a nasty hand and often takes it out on others. He has problems regulating his anger, jealousy and lust. The small number of friends he does have are just as toxic as he is with the exception of one.

Shandee Wilson
17 years old, 6'0, light brown curly bundle of afro-like hair, curvy body blessed or cursed with G-cup breasts and a bottom to match.
Due to a murky and unfortunate past, Shandee was orphaned at a very young age and eventually adopted by a conservative white family in the suburbs making her stand out more than a little even before her figure developed. She lives in a small 'everybody-knows-everybody' town where she has a reputation for being on the duller end of the intelligence spectrum. She's developed in all the ways her family disapproves of and due to their efforts to guide her away from their perceived evils, she even developed a bit of a porn addiction (with a few odd fantasies).

All of the above characters have families and friends you can add, or if you like you can add-in your own character, feel free to message me about anything and I look forward to reading your submissions:
